name: Aswadh Cat Scratching Ball Exercise Wooden for Pet Supplies 9.84x11.02x9.45 inch
description: Description:Material: made of solid wood and sisal rope material, it is environmentally,strong and durable.Design: fit most cats and kittens,it is carefully designed according to cat's daily habits, practical, space-saving, small and compact, and doesn't take up too much space.Attract the cat's attention: attract your cat to play,and protect your furniture from scratches and satisfy the cat's natural scratching instinct,increase cat's exercise and fun.Safe: the base of triangle frame is designed to support sisal ball, which is difficult to pour, so that cats can not be hurt and safer when play
